# Confidential Information | WORK INSTRUCTIONS | | | | |----------------------|-------------------|----------------------|--------------------| | LOOSE PANEL REWORK | | | | | Work Instruction No. | | | | | 01
Revision No. | WI03
Site Code | 1
3
Page
OF | Zebra Technologies | ### 1. OVERVIEW This document outlines the procedure for reworking the side panel of the F100 Robot base. ### 2. PANEL REWORK **1.** Identify the panel that needs rework. ![](_page_0_Picture_6.jpeg) ![](_page_0_Picture_7.jpeg) ![](_page_0_Picture_8.jpeg) **2.** Loosen the screw to the extent where we can easily move the front and side panels for the rework. ![](_page_0_Picture_10.jpeg) - **3.** Overlap the side panel to the front panel by pushing the panels together. - ✓ The bottom tab of the side panel should be properly aligned with the front panel. ![](_page_0_Picture_13.jpeg) *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* **4.** Hold the panels in place by hand or with tape (Tesa appliance tape). #### **The are 2 ways to tighten the screw:** a. Torque screw manually by hand until tight ![](_page_1_Picture_3.jpeg) ![](_page_1_Picture_4.jpeg) - b. Use an electric driver on level 2 and a high setting. - ✓ Be mindful of the force being used, too much could potentially cause a threated screw. ![](_page_1_Picture_7.jpeg) ![](_page_1_Picture_8.jpeg) - **5.** Ensure the rework is complete by gently pulling the bottom of the panel. - ✓ It should not be loose. ![](_page_1_Picture_11.jpeg) *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* ### **6.** Rework completed. ### 3. REFERENCES | Document # | Document Title | | | |------------|----------------|--|--| | | IMG_0051.MOV | | | ## 4. REVISION HISTORY The following table lists all revisions (including the original document) to this procedure, the date, and the reason for the revision. ![](_page_2_Picture_5.jpeg) | Rev. | Rev. Date | Description of Change | Revised By | |------|------------|-----------------------|------------| | 01 | 07/21/2023 | Original issue | A.Cabrera |
